meta_title: For Freelancers: client workflow to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Fix Debugging Roadblocks
content.seo_description: Master a professional client workflow to overcome debugging bottlenecks using Antigravity and Claude Code. Ship faster and impress your clients.
content.answer_block: Stop manually chasing bugs. By integrating Antigravity for automated state analysis and Claude Code for iterative repairs, you transform debugging from a frantic patch-job into a structured, repeatable client workflow. This system ensures code integrity, reduces technical debt, and allows you to deliver high-quality, production-ready features at double your usual speed.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, the client deadline is looming, and your codebase has become a labyrinth of silent failures. You are staring at a stack trace that makes no sense, feeling the creeping dread that your reputation as a high-velocity freelancer is on the line. Debugging shouldn't feel like a high-stakes guessing game; it should be a surgical, predictable process that turns complexity into clear, shippable logic.

Today, we move beyond the 'print-statement' era. We are installing a professional-grade scaffolding into your development cycle that leverages AI-driven reasoning and autonomous code analysis. By standardizing how we approach errors, we reclaim our time and build the kind of bulletproof systems that keep clients paying top-dollar for years to come.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Vector
steps.description: Before fixing, you must define the scope. Use Antigravity to map the execution flow and identify where the state deviates from expected output.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current execution trace and identify the specific function responsible for the state divergence. Output the culprit line and explain the variable mismatch.

steps.title: Generate a Minimal Reproducible Test
steps.description: Create a unit test that fails consistently. This prevents regressions and provides a clear 'green light' for when the fix is verified.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Jest test case that triggers the identified failure vector using the current context.

steps.title: Automate the Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform a deep dive into the dependency chain of the failing module to ensure the fix doesn't cause side effects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a dependency impact analysis on the identified code block. List potential side effects of modifying these variables.

steps.title: Apply Surgical Patching
steps.description: Execute the fix using an iterative approach. Never replace the whole file; apply targeted patches to maintain architecture integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a surgical patch for the identified bug that adheres to the existing architectural pattern.

steps.title: Regression Validation
steps.description: Run the full suite to ensure the fix holds and that no secondary systems were impacted by the change.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the full test suite and verify that the initial failure is resolved and no new errors are introduced.

pro_tips: Always commit your state snapshots before running Claude Code to allow for an instant 'undo' if the AI hallucinates a path.
Use Antigravity to generate documentation comments immediately after a fix is verified; it keeps your codebase self-documenting for clients.
Configure your Claude Code environment to ignore node_modules and build directories to speed up reasoning time by 40%.
When a bug is complex, ask the AI to 'explain the logic as if I am a junior dev' to ensure you fully grasp the fix before merging.
Maintain a 'Bug-Fix Log' markdown file updated by Claude Code to prove your value to clients during project reviews.
content.next_steps: Integrate these CLI commands into your CI/CD pipeline to automate the pre-flight check process for all future client deliverables.
content.conversion_block: Stop struggling with broken code and start building a high-velocity freelance business that scales. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
